name: cliks-workspace
description: Cliks ambient coworking prototype: Vercel site, Render backend, and Go CLI.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @cliks/server run build && npm --workspace @cliks/site run build && npm --workspace @cliks/cli run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace @cliks/server run check && npm --workspace @cliks/site run check && npm --workspace @cliks/cli run check && npm run check:tools
scripts.check:tools: node --check scripts/load-test.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-server.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-reactions.mjs
